PROP-01b-partial2-inv-001.text: auctionCallback must reject calls where msg.sender is not the stored auction contract.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-001.assertion: forall call auctionCallback(from, assetIn, amountIn, assetOut, amountOut, data): msg.sender == address(s_auction)

locations.note: msg.sender != address(s_auction) check combined with from check at line 103; reverts AccessForbidden
